SEARCH
Package com.lattice.routing

Class JoinGroup

java.lang.Object
com.lattice.routing.JoinGroup
public final class JoinGroup extends Object
Values delivered to a join combiner for one stamp.

Runtime join groups are reused after the combiner returns. Read values inside the combiner and copy anything that must outlive that call with snapshotValuesBySource().

  • Constructor Details

    • JoinGroup

      public JoinGroup(Object stamp, Map<String,Object> valuesBySource, boolean complete, boolean timedOut, String triggeringSource)

  • Method Details

    • reusableRuntimeGroup

      public static JoinGroup reusableRuntimeGroup(Map<String,Object> valuesBySource)
      Runtime support factory for allocation-free join delivery.

      User code normally receives join groups from JoinSpec combiners and should construct snapshots with snapshotValuesBySource() when values must be retained.

    • resetRuntime

      public void resetRuntime(Object stamp, boolean complete, boolean timedOut, String triggeringSource)
      Runtime support hook for reusing a join group instance.

      User code should not call this method from a combiner.

    • resetRuntime

      public void resetRuntime(long stamp, boolean complete, boolean timedOut, String triggeringSource)
      Runtime support hook for reusing a join group instance with a long stamp.

      User code should not call this method from a combiner.

    • stamp

      public Object stamp()
      Returns this group's stamp.

      Long-stamped groups return a boxed Long; use longStamp() in performance-sensitive combiners.

    • usesLongStamp

      public boolean usesLongStamp()
      Returns whether this group was stamped through primitive long extraction.

    • longStamp

      public long longStamp()
      Returns the stamp as a primitive long.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the stamp is not long-compatible

    • valuesBySource

      public Map<String,Object> valuesBySource()
      Returns the current values by source name.

      Runtime groups may reuse this map after the combiner returns. Use snapshotValuesBySource() to retain values beyond the callback.

    • snapshotValuesBySource

      public Map<String,Object> snapshotValuesBySource()
      Returns a stable copy of the currently present values.

      This is the safe form to retain beyond the combiner call because runtime join groups and their map views are reused.

    • complete

      public boolean complete()
      Returns whether all expected branches are present.

    • timedOut

      public boolean timedOut()
      Returns whether this group was emitted because a join timeout elapsed.

    • triggeringSource

      public String triggeringSource()
      Returns the source branch that completed or triggered this group, when known.

    • value

      public <T> Optional<T> value(String sourceName, Class<T> type)
      Returns a typed value from the source map.
